ocr.text: DevelopmentPipelineStatus  CNYAmount
ProjectCategory  CompletionStatus
DataCenter  Active  150MCNY  70%  Phase2
CloudHub  Planned  200MCNY  N/A  Phase1
Colocation  InProgress  120MCNY  50%  Phase3
EdgeFacility  Completed  80MCNY  100%  Total
The Development Pipeline Status for Digital Realty Trust in FY2023 reflects a diverse portfolio across various project
categories, emphasizing the company’s strategic focus on enhancing its offerings in the Asia-Pacific region. The first project
category, Data Center, is currently active with a total investment of 150MCNY, achieving a completion status of 70% and is in
Phase 2 of its development. This indicates a robust progression towards operational readiness and capacity enhancements. In
contrast, the CloudHub project is in the planned stage, representing a significant investment of 200MCNY; however, it currently
has a completion status of N/A as it has yet to enter the execution phase, categorized under Phase 1. The CloudHub initiative
signifies Digital Realty Trust's commitment to expanding its cloud-based solutions, addressing the growing demand for digital
infrastructure in the region. Meanwhile, the Colocation project is in progress, with an investment of 120MCNY and a
completion status of 50%, currently located in Phase 3 of development. This reflects a moderate advancement towards its
anticipated operational capacity and indicates ongoing efforts to enhance colocation services, aligning with market demand.
Additionally, the Edge Facility project has reached completion with an investment of 80MCNY, achieving a full completion
status of 100% and categorized under Total, highlighting the company’s successful delivery of this facility and its readiness to
serve clients immediately. The overall allocation of resources across these projects underscores Digital Realty Trust's strategic
positioning within the competitive landscape of the Asia-Pacific real estate and REITs sector, aiming to leverage emerging
opportunities and meet the evolving needs of its clientele. The varying statuses of the projects—active, planned, in progress,
and completed—demonstrate a comprehensive approach to balancing immediate operational needs with future growth potential.
Each project category serves a unique role in the broader strategy of Digital Realty Trust, contributing to a diversified portfolio
that is responsive to technological advancements and market shifts. The financial commitment across these projects, totaling
550MCNY when summing the active, planned, in-progress, and completed projects, illustrates the company's substantial
investment in building out essential infrastructure that supports digital transformation within the region. As Digital Realty Trust
continues to advance these projects, it remains poised to enhance its market position and capitalize on the burgeoning demand
for data centers, colocation, and edge facilities driven by the rapid expansion of cloud services and digital ecosystems across
Asia-Pacific. The current pipeline status not only reflects the company's operational capabilities but also its strategic foresight
in navigating the complexities of the real estate market, ensuring that it remains at the forefront of innovation and service
delivery in the digital age. The juxtaposition of project categories and their respective completion statuses provides a clear
snapshot of Digital Realty Trust's ongoing efforts to enhance its infrastructure capabilities while aligning with the long-term
vision for sustainable growth and customer satisfaction in the dynamic Asia-Pacific market. Consequently, the Development
Pipeline Status serves as a vital indicator of the company's trajectory and readiness to adapt to the evolving landscape of digital
real estate investment and infrastructure development.
